nasb.text: Therefore behold, I am against the prophets,” declares the Lord, “who steal My words from each other.

esv.text: Therefore, behold, I am against the prophets, declares the Lord, who steal my words from one another.

cnv.text: “所以，看哪！那些先知互相偷取對方的話，當作我的話，我要對付他們。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，我要对付那些假先知，他们盗用同伙的话，却妄称是我的话。”
